description_long: This is a small, decorative wooden footbridge with a gently arched deck composed of several wide, flat planks. The bridge features four upright posts at each corner, each topped with a rounded wooden finial, providing a simple yet charming visual accent. The posts are connected to the deck by sturdy, dark-colored supports, suggesting a robust construction suitable for pedestrian use in parks or gardens. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the bridge a natural, rustic appearance. The deck is slightly elevated in the center, enhancing the arch effect and allowing for minor water passage beneath. There are no visible railings between the posts, making the bridge open and accessible from either end.
description: A small, arched wooden footbridge with four corner posts topped by round finials and a plank deck. The bridge has a rustic, natural look and is open on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched deck, four upright posts with round finials, and the open sides of the bridge.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the wooden planks of the deck and the symmetrical placement of the posts at each corner.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the arch, posts, and open design.
description_view_3: Top-down view from the opposite end, again showing the plank arrangement and post positions.
attribute_railing_design: wooden posts with round finials, no connecting rails
